name: How to remove Meta Business Suite from your Facebook page
description: Learn the simple steps on how to remove Meta Business Suite from your Facebook page. Follow our guide and get rid of the unwanted app in just a few clicks. Ensure the security and privacy of your Facebook business account today!
main_title: How to remove Meta Business Suite from your Facebook page
richtext:
An easy step-by-step guide for removing the Meta Business Suite app from a Facebook page. Effortlessly streamline your Facebook experience by removing the app and its features. 

‍

Step-by-Step Guide on How to remove Meta Business Suite from your Facebook page

Step 1: Log in to your Facebook account and go to your Facebook business page.

Step 2: Click on the “Gear Icon” option located from the dropdown.

Step 3: Select “Business Settings” from the left-side menu.

Step 4: Navigate to the Accounts tab and find “Pages”

Step 5: Select your “Business Page” next to the Meta Business Suite app.

Step 6: Click “Remove” next to the app name.

Step 7: Confirm the removal by clicking “Remove” in the pop-up window.

‍

By following these steps, you should be able to successfully remove the Meta Business Suite from your Facebook page.

‍
